text: Hi, thanks for sending me this file. I was taking a look at it and I see the data that you have added here, the website and the first name and last name along with the LinkedIn profile links. What I would say is, yes, I didn't have the company websites and because I'm solely focusing right now on LinkedIn, I also don't need the email for now. I'm not planning to do any LinkedIn email marketing push. And also this is something that I probably don't need right now. What I will say is I just need the LinkedIn profile links. And what I see here is, for example, For this website, for this company, for example, maybe this is just an example where you have given me one profile link for each company. It can be more than one because you see, if I apply those filters. Yes, you asked me for the screenshot. I'll provide you that with that. So it's not just the owner or CEO, so it could be owner partner, it could be any CXOs, any data directors, or any vice president or even senior manager. And also among those people, there can be vice president of sales. Right? There could be vice president of operations. I don't need them. I need the vice president of marketing or vice president of E Commerce, director of marketing, director of E Commerce or director of growth, maybe even strategy, in some cases chief strategy Officer. So I need these kind of people. So there will be multiple people. I mean, if the company is a bit big, I'm not filtering them based on the number of employees. For now. See, if let's say they have 50 employees or 100 employees, it is expected that there will be multiple relevant people to contact with, to get in touch with. So, yeah, that's something that I noticed. We can expect to get multiple people compared to one person for each company. That's the only thing that I wanted to tell you and I really appreciate what you're doing for me. Thank you so much for taking your time to do this. Let me know if I can help you in some way. All right, so this is it. I'll send you this video and also a screenshot of my filters on my Sales Navigator. Thank you. Bye for now.
